creator: phil@krylov.eu
text: The ZFS fix for the bug has been released in OpenZFS 2.1.2 and 2.0.7 releases. OpenZFS HEAD has been merged to 13.0-STABLE. It is still not evident to me how we laymen should proceed with securing our 13.0-RELEASE installations. Should we wait for releng/13.0 to merge OpenZFS 2.0.7?
